DEFENDANT GAUTIER LOUIS PERCEVAL SAINT-DENIS'S MOTION TO EXTEND TIME TO HAVE THE MATTER ARBITRATED IS HEARD THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS EXTENDED TO 9/15/2005. THE OSC IS RE-SET TO 10/20/2005 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT TO GIVE NOTICE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA VISCIO, CSR#12353. (212)
